description_long: This is a wooden spoon with a rounded, deep bowl and a long, straight handle. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, handcrafted appearance. The bowl is slightly darker at the base, possibly due to staining or use, and the handle tapers gently towards the end. The spoon's surface appears smooth with a semi-gloss finish, indicating it has been polished. There are no visible metal or plastic components, and the entire object is a single piece of carved wood. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for stirring or serving food.
description: A polished wooden spoon with a rounded bowl and a long, straight handle, featuring visible wood grain and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the spoon, highlighting the rounded bowl and straight handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the wide, rounded bowl and the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the spoon's profile and the curvature of the bowl.
description_view_3: View from the bowl end, showing the depth and circular shape of the bowl with the handle receding away.
attribute_orientation: bowl facing left, handle extending to the right
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a countertop or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with other spoons
